title: Interesting Eva Reprise pic
wikitext:
[]: Interesting Eva Reprise pic             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Sun May 20, 2007 4:46 pm I found this pic whilst searching for some good eva images. It struck me as odd. Shinji greatly resembles his father. I was curious about it... Where is it from? Is it a hoax or a scrapped idea?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 20, 2007 4:50 pm It was a hoax.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 20, 2007 4:51 pm Legendary 'shop. They aged Shinji right.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 4:54 pm NAveryW wrote: It was a hoax.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 20, 2007 5:16 pm Yeah, I never realized how well they interpolated Shinji and Gendo for Shinji's older age until Haba Bandito pointed it out.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun May 20, 2007 5:17 pm well, he spent enough of his childhood looking like his mom, its about time he looked a bit like his dad.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun May 20, 2007 5:31 pm slothen wrote: well, he spent enough of his childhood looking like his mom, its about time he looked a bit like his dad.

[]: reprise             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Sun May 20, 2007 5:36 pm Fascinating stuff, ya know. Thanks for the info. I agree its very well done, whoever did it. Really captured Sadamoto's work. Wonder what it was for, exactly? Anyhow, interesting stuff...

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 5:36 pm I am going to fucking kill you one of these days :P

[]: reprise             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Sun May 20, 2007 5:37 pm Nadia's great, btw. Good pic...

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun May 20, 2007 5:39 pm BrikHaus wrote: slothen wrote: well, he spent enough of his childhood looking like his mom, its about time he looked a bit like his dad.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun May 20, 2007 5:55 pm Sadamoto wrote: Speaking in concrete terms, his eyes are a girl's eyes. I drew them exactly as I drew those of Nadia. He's a male Nadia, just as if I had given Nadia a masculine makeover. Lengthen Shinji's eyelashes and change the hair style, and you have her.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun May 20, 2007 6:05 pm Isn't there a thread for this somewhere already?

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sun May 20, 2007 6:38 pm Sadamoto was the character designer. If anyone knows how Shinji's drawn, it's him.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun May 20, 2007 7:18 pm Sadamoto wrote: Speaking in concrete terms, his eyes are a girl's eyes. I drew them exactly as I drew those of Nadia. He's a male Nadia, just as if I had given Nadia a masculine makeover. Lengthen Shinji's eyelashes and change the hair style, and you have her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun May 20, 2007 8:39 pm ...How old is this pic, anyway? Rei teh 3rd is looking good though she needs MOAR Lilith wings or something, but what's with Asuka pulling a Hyatt? :shock: At least the artist made sure Shinji's a "less bug-eyed version of his dad". (Reichu-ism) Shinji wearing the cross is a nice touch.

[]: reprise             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Sun May 20, 2007 8:49 pm would Asuka pulling a Hyatt make Shinji pulling a Watanabe? And this inevitably raises the question: would Rei be pulling an Excel or a Sumiyoshi? Just putting that out there...

[]: mmmm...That pic looks well done..             Quote Post by digital88 » Mon May 21, 2007 11:05 am Altough a hoax, pointed earlier in the forum..Shinji looks loads like Gendo..and of course Ms Clone Rei..Looks almost like Yui when she was still alive but ive recently watched Nadia..and well she sorta looks like Shinji if u added the masculine parts..but 1 too many Shinjis either boy or girl is bad enuff for this world LOL

[]: Re: mmmm...That pic looks well done..             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon May 21, 2007 11:22 am digital88 wrote: 1 too many Shinjis either boy or girl is bad enuff for this world LOL

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Mon May 21, 2007 11:42 am Mr. Tines wrote: Legendary 'shop.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 20, 2007 4:50 pm It was a hoax.
